import { Terminal } from "lucide-react"; import { AnalyticsCard } from "./AnalyticsCard"; export function CliSetupHint() { return (

No sessions yet

Install the Rudel CLI and enable automatic uploads to start tracking your team's Claude Code sessions.

1. Install the CLI globally 

							npm install -g rudel

2. Log in to your account 

							rudel login

3. Enable auto-upload in your repository 

							rudel enable

Sessions will appear here automatically after your next Claude Code session ends.

); }

content.text:
Perfect! PR created: https://github.com/obsessiondb/rudel/pull/103

The changes include:
1. **Improved empty state hint** - Added guidance that `rudel enable` will offer to upload previous sessions, and that `rudel upload` can be used at any time
2. **Removed stale file** - Deleted the unused `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
